name: Aeon Fantasy Co., Ltd.
summary: Aeon Fantasy Co., Ltd. creates, manages, and promotes indoor theme parks with entertainment and amusement facilities in Japan. It provides various facilities, including merry-go-rounds, interactive games, medal games, card games, and other amusement items. The company also develops and sells original play equipment and prizes. Its theme parks serve children less than 12 years of age, and their families. The company operates approximately 873 outlets. Aeon Fantasy Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Jusco Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Chiba, Japan. Aeon Fantasy Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Aeon Co., Ltd.
